headline: Samsung Introduces New Education Tools for Interactive Displays at ISTELive 26
summary: Samsung Electronics today announced new education solutions for its Android-based Samsung Interactive Display lineup, making shared classroom displays easier to personalize and manage. Announced and exhibited at ISTELive 26, a leading education technology conference that is being hosted by the International Society for Technology in Education (ISTE) from June 28-July 1 in Orlando, Florida, the […]

headline: Samsung Electronics Releases 2026 Sustainability Report, Expanding Water Replenishment Efforts
summary: On June 26, Samsung Electronics released the 2026 edition of its Sustainability Report. The report details Samsung’s key environmental, social and governance strategies and achievements as the company works to fulfill its corporate responsibilities and build a foundation for sustainable growth amid evolving geopolitical risks and the rapid advancement of AI. In particular, the report […]

headline: Samsung Electronics Begins Shipment of Industry-First HBM4E Samples
summary: Samsung Electronics, a global leader in advanced memory technology, today announced that it has begun shipping the industry’s first 12-layer HBM4E samples to major global customers, further strengthening its leadership in the next-generation HBM market. Following the industry’s first mass production and commercial shipment of its industry-leading HBM4 earlier this year, Samsung now extends its […]
